creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 6/19/12 2:40 PM, Mikhail Tsatsenko wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/162511; it has been noted by GNATS.
>
> From: Mikhail Tsatsenko<m.tsatsenko@gmail.com>
> To: bug-followup@freebsd.org
> Cc:
> Subject: Re: ports/162511: [NEW PORT] net-im/imspector-devel devel version of imspector
> Date: Tue, 19 Jun 2012 22:30:24 +0400
>
>   I still need this port.
>   It is very unlikely that a newer version iv available because upstream
>   development is not active at the moment.
two options, that I see:
1) why not just update net-im/imspector ? if upstream isn't working on it
2) if you really want a -devel branch, then you need to call for a 
repocopy, from net-im/imspector -> net-im/imspector-devel, and attach 
patches against the copy
(we need to do the repocopy)


-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
 >*| * SECNAP Network Security Corporation
